---
title: Remote work rates vary across rural regions
description: Bar chart showing remote work rates by rural Census region.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-remote-work-bar-rural-regions/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Labor Market
  - Technology
  - Geography
tags:
  - ACS
  - Remote Work
  - Telework
  - Rural
  - Regional
  - Bar Chart
image: remote_work_bar_rural_regions.svg
chart:
  title: Remote work rates vary across rural regions
  chartType: bar
  interactive: false
  source: U.S. Census Bureau
  sourceUrl: https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/acs
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - american-community-survey
usesPackages:
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This bar chart compares remote work rates across rural regions, showing geographic variation in remote work adoption.](./remote_work_bar_rural_regions.svg)

## Overview

This bar chart compares remote work rates across rural regions, showing geographic variation in remote work adoption.

## Key Findings

- Rural West has the highest remote work rates
- Rural South and Midwest have lower remote work adoption
- Regional variation reflects differences in industry mix and broadband access

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/remote_work_density_plot.R` in the producing project.
